---
title: "about_page_4"
author: "Edward"
date: "2026-03-04"
output: html_document
---

<div style="text-align: center; padding: 20px; max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto;">
  
  <!-- Step 1 -->
  <div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); color: white; padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px; margin: 15px 0; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);">
    <h3 style="margin: 0; font-size: 18px;">
      <i class="fa fa-mouse-pointer"></i> Step 1: User Access
    </h3>
    <p style="margin: 10px 0 0 0; font-size: 14px;">Click application URL or link</p>
  </div>
  
  <div style="font-size: 30px; color: #667eea; margin: 10px 0;">⬇</div>
  
  <!-- Step 2 -->
  <div style="background: #f8f9fa; padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px; margin: 15px 0; border-left: 5px solid #667eea; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);">
    <h3 style="margin: 0; font-size: 18px; color: #667eea;">
      <i class="fa fa-spinner fa-spin"></i> Step 2: Loading Screen
    </h3>
    <p style="margin: 10px 0 0 0; font-size: 14px; color: #666;">
      Animated spinner displays<br>
      <strong>Duration:</strong> 1-5 seconds
    </p>
  </div>
  
  <div style="font-size: 30px; color: #667eea; margin: 10px 0;">⬇</div>
  
  <!-- Step 3 -->
  <div style="background: #f8f9fa; padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px; margin: 15px 0; border-left: 5px solid #3498DB; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);">
    <h3 style="margin: 0; font-size: 18px; color: #3498DB;">
      <i class="fa fa-cogs"></i> Step 3: Backend Initialization
    </h3>
    <p style="margin: 10px 0 0 0; font-size: 14px; color: #666;">
      • Load malaria data (2012-2023)<br>
      • Initialize climate variables<br>
      • Prepare GAM models (80+ models)<br>
      • Load Ghana region maps
    </p>
  </div>
  
  <div style="font-size: 30px; color: #667eea; margin: 10px 0;">⬇</div>
  
  <!-- Step 4 -->
  <div style="background: #f8f9fa; padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px; margin: 15px 0; border-left: 5px solid #F39C12; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);">
    <h3 style="margin: 0; font-size: 18px; color: #F39C12;">
      <i class="fa fa-paint-brush"></i> Step 4: UI Construction
    </h3>
    <p style="margin: 10px 0 0 0; font-size: 14px; color: #666;">
      • Build navigation tabs<br>
      • Apply CSS styling<br>
      • Render welcome page<br>
      • Setup interactive elements
    </p>
  </div>
  
  <div style="font-size: 30px; color: #667eea; margin: 10px 0;">⬇</div>
  
  <!-- Step 5 -->
  <div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #27AE60 0%, #229954 100%); color: white; padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px; margin: 15px 0; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);">
    <h3 style="margin: 0; font-size: 18px;">
      <i class="fa fa-check-circle"></i> Step 5: App Ready!
    </h3>
    <p style="margin: 10px 0 0 0; font-size: 14px;">
      Welcome page displays<br>
      All features available for use
    </p>
  </div>
  
  <div style="font-size: 30px; color: #667eea; margin: 10px 0;">⬇</div>
  
  <!-- Step 6 -->
  <div style="background: white; padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px; margin: 15px 0; border: 3px dashed #667eea; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);">
    <h3 style="margin: 0; font-size: 18px; color: #667eea;">
      <i class="fa fa-users"></i> Step 6: User Interaction
    </h3>
    <p style="margin: 10px 0 0 0; font-size: 14px; color: #666;">
      • Navigate between tabs<br>
      • Select regions and date ranges<br>
      • View analysis and visualizations<br>
      • Explore model estimates and diagnostics<br>
      • Download results
    </p>
  </div>

</div>
